title: Assistant Store Manager - Vishal Mega Mart - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Vishal Mega Mart - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!
